# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [unreleased]

### Features

- Meth enum, Hit.strand, map_many, setter parity, docstrings, tests
- Add Aligner::map_many batch alignment for throughput
- Zero-copy query seq, ergonomics, and rustdoc
- Minibwa Rust and Python bindings

### Tests

- Fill coverage gaps — error paths, strand, hit fields, multi-contig
